extraction.one_line_summary: KOVSKI Michal won a two-up sprint by photo finish after INEOS burned off VAN DER POEL's team with sustained pace, then KOVSKI bridged solo with 2km remaining.
tactical_patterns: INEOS deployed four riders in sustained pace train (not explosive attacks) to isolate VAN DER POEL before finale.
VAN DER POEL marked rather than initiating, fatal when teammate-less; others exploited his hesitation to avoid pulling.
KOVSKI bridged 20-second gap solo inside 2km while chasers marked each other, revealing race-of-truth opportunity.

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: negative: burned entire team early then marked reactively instead of attacking, caught in strategic paralysis when isolated
rider_signals.TURNER Ben: positive: anchored INEOS pace train that fractured field, showed domestique strength sufficient to isolate pre-race favorite
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: neutral: worked turns with KOVSKI but INEOS ultimately chose KOVSKI for final effort
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: neutral: UAE attempted move but marked immediately, showing insufficient threat level
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: negative: attempted late bridge but failed, Jumbo-Visma tactics showed no coherent plan
